faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for various courses at NIF Global, Lindsay Street?
faqs.answer: NIFD Global Kolkata fees structure varies from course to course depending on the duration and the level of it. The Institute offers UG, PG and Certification programmes provided by the 3 Schools of Design, Beauty and Management. NIFD Global Kolkata offers these courses within the fee structure of INR 40 K to INR 8.12 Lakh.

faqs.question: Can NIF Global, Lindsay Street be considered a good college?
faqs.answer: A private institute established in 1999, International Institute of Fashion Design (INIFD) is located in Lindsay Street, Kolkata. The Institute offers specialisations in Fashion, Design and Management through the Schools of Design, Beauty and Management. INIFD Kolkata has various academic partners that provide resources for the curriculum and skill development outside the classrooms. Therefore, to conclude, the industrial exposure of the Institute makes it a good college for the students.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in various courses at NIF Global, Lindsay Street?
faqs.answer: NIF Global, Lindsay Street admission process commence through the online application submission. Admissions are conducted based on the merit. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and must have passed from a recognised board. Candidates must enquire at the Institute to seek for the eligiblity criteria set during admission. The Institute accepts ISC, CBSE 12, WBCHSE etc. as the qualification criteria to seek admission at NIF Global, Lindsay Street.

faqs.question: What are the various courses offered at NIF Global, Lindsay Street?
faqs.answer: NIF Global, Lindsay Street has School of Design, Beauty and Management through which it offers various specialisations such as Fashion Design, Interior Design, Makeup and Hair Artistry, Retail Management, Design Management etc. The Institute also offers various Certificate level courses or Diploma courses apart from this. NIF Global, Lindsay Street offers various opportunities to gain practical knowledge through the industry based interactions.

college_info.intro:
NIF Global Kolkata offers various specialisations in UG, PG and Certification levels provided by the 3 Schools. The Institute offers specialisations such as Fashion Design, Interior Design, Makeup and Hair Artistry, Design Management, Fashion Communication and Retail Management. All the specialisations are segregated into 3 Schools, the School of Design, Beauty and Management. Apart from this, the Institution offers various Certificate level courses for the duration of 3 months to 3 years.
Among these all, NIF Global Lindsay Street consider BDes and BVoc as its popular programmes. To learn more about NIF Global Lindsay Street popular programmes, check out the listings provided below:

placements.overview: NIF Global Lindsay Street offers 100% placement support under all Fashion and Interior Design courses. The placement team conducts placement drives and showcases several projects/ presentations/ exhibitions that are facilitated by several academic partners. The Institute proactively participates in providing experiences outside the school. Apart from this, the Institute also conducts training and internship activities. The Institute recorded a median salary of INR 1.45 - INR 3 LPA for the Certificate level graduates. Similarly, for BDes, the Institute recorded a median salary of INR 3 LPA and INR 2.5 LPA for courses such as BVoc. Some of the top recruiters of NIF Global Lindsay Street placements are shown below:

The Institute has academic partners that facilitate exposure to the industry which further provide practical knowledge of concepts. These academic partners provide various projects and residential courses for students to enhance the portfolios. reviews_list.batch_info: Specialisation Program in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is quite good.

review_content.Placements: Around 20%-30% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month, and the average salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 2,500 per month. Top recruiting companies for our course are Pankaj & Nidhi and Rahul Mishra. About 20% of the students got internships from our college. The assistant designer is the top role offered to us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The library has various books, and the computer lab is also quite amazing. The quality of the food served in the mess is pathetic, and I wouldn't recommend you to eat in the college mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advance Program in Fashion Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college to learn and explore.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 14 students in our batch. Our placement session is going to complete at the end of June. I am not aware of the salary offered to the students. Top roles offered to the students are designer, VC and a store manager of reputed brand. Our course has not completed yet, so I can't say about the salary offered to the students in our course. Till now, none of the students got an internship, as we haven't completed our course yet.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a well-facilitated infrastructure, labs and classrooms. There are many books in the library which are very useful for students to complete our given assignment. Institute provides an international platform for students to participate in several shows like New York fashion week, London fashion week and Lake fashion week genex.

reviews_list.batch_info: Foundation Program in Fashion Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty but the placements are not good.

review_content.Placements: There is some time left for the placements of our batch, and I have no idea about the placements of my senior batch. I have heard that one of my roommates got a placement. There is no placement cell. It would definitely be useful to have a placement cell. I hope I also get some opportunity when my turn comes.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is good, and our college building is not that good. I did not like my college building as it is just on one floor. The college area is not big enough. The classrooms are good and air-conditioned. The library and all are also good. We don't have a canteen or a hostel system which I disliked as I came from another city and I faced a lot of problems in the beginning.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advance Program in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: INIFD, a college for best future.

review_content.Placements: The placements in our college are very good. Most of the placements offered are in renowned companies. The salary offered by the companies is very good. The college provides internships and industrial visits. We have the highest stipends during the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have everything needed on the college campus. The whole college is centrally air-conditioned. The library has many books required for the students. Free Wi-Fi is given to the students for work purpose. The quality of labs is very good. We didn't face any infrastructural related issues during the tenure.

reviews_list.batch_info: Specialisation Program in Fashion Design - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: A good place to develop your skills, creativity and to make a good career in fashion designing.

review_content.Placements: Placements offered were very good. Almost 70-75% of students from my batch got placed in good companies with good remuneration. Roles offered were based on the course, like an assistant fashion designer, production manager, fashion stylist, visual merchandiser, etc. The work place was comfortable with supporting colleagues.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not very big, yet large enough to accommodate a good number of students. Proper seating arrangements are made for the students with full A.C, and the production department has all the machinery required for pattern classes. CAD rooms were well-maintained with good computer systems.

reviews_list.batch_info: Specialisation Program in Fashion Design - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Slightly dissatisfied because of no placement.

review_content.Placements: The placements were not so good. Near about three to five students were provided with placement. The salary was up to 10k. In the institute, only one company visited. The roles that the students were given were in the designing field and retail merchandising. Near about 10 percent students got an internship. The highest stipend offered was 5k and the lowest stipend was 3k.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average. The institute has Wi-Fi, garment construction lab, computer lab, small library, and first aid box. There were no games and sports facilities since the campus did not have any playground or open area. There was no canteen. There were no hostel rooms. I did not face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

admission_process.title: NIF Global, Lindsay Street Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NIF Global, Lindsay Street admission 2025is going on. The college has a range of courses, including BDes, BVoc, & MDes, MVoc at both undergraduate & postgraduate levels. In addition to these, The college also offers diploma & certificate courses. To gain admission to NIF Global, Lindsay Street, students must meet the institute's eligibility Requirement. The college application process is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about NIF Global, Lindsay Street admission 2025,along with course-wise eligibility, selection Requirement & admission process:

NIF Global, Lindsay Street admission 2025 is live on the college's official site. The college has courses under 3 schools, like the School of Design, Beauty & Management. The courses given by the college include BVoc, BBA, BDes & others. Admission to all the courses is merit-based. Interested students can check out the updated info about NIF Global, Lindsay Street courses eligibility & selection Requirement in the following table:

NIF Global, Lindsay Street admission is a multi-process. students seeking admission to UG, PG, diploma, & certificate courses of the institute must go through a detailedNIF Global, Lindsay Street admission process 2025.
1: NIF Global, Lindsay Street Application Process

students interested in admission to various programmes at NIF Global, Lindsay Street must fill out the admission form online. Application forms cannot be submitted without uploading the required docs.
2: NIF Global, Lindsay Street Selection Round

According to the selection Requirement, the students must have passed 12th for admission to UG, diploma, & certificate courses, &graduation degreefor admission to PG courses. The college releases the shortlisted students’ list based on their merits.
3: Admission Confirmation
The selected students must make the NIF Global, Lindsay Street fee payment within the given deadline to secure their seats.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Fashion Design Labs, Interior Design Labs

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The library has various books, and the computer lab is also quite amazing. The quality of the food served in the mess is pathetic, and I wouldn't recommend you to eat in the college mess.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to learn and explore.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a well-facilitated infrastructure, labs and classrooms. There are many books in the library which are very useful for students to complete our given assignment. Institute provides an international platform for students to participate in several shows like New York fashion week, London fashion week and Lake fashion week genex.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty but the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is good, and our college building is not that good. I did not like my college building as it is just on one floor. The college area is not big enough. The classrooms are good and air-conditioned. The library and all are also good. We don't have a canteen or a hostel system which I disliked as I came from another city and I faced a lot of problems in the beginning.

reviews.review_heading: INIFD, a college for best future.
reviews.review_text: We have everything needed on the college campus. The whole college is centrally air-conditioned. The library has many books required for the students. Free Wi-Fi is given to the students for work purpose. The quality of labs is very good. We didn't face any infrastructural related issues during the tenure.

reviews.review_heading: A good place to develop your skills, creativity and to make a good career in fashion designing.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not very big, yet large enough to accommodate a good number of students. Proper seating arrangements are made for the students with full A.C, and the production department has all the machinery required for pattern classes. CAD rooms were well-maintained with good computer systems.

reviews.review_heading: Slightly dissatisfied because of no placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average. The institute has Wi-Fi, garment construction lab, computer lab, small library, and first aid box. There were no games and sports facilities since the campus did not have any playground or open area. There was no canteen. There were no hostel rooms. I did not face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best institution in India for fashion designing.
reviews.review_text: My college offers one of the best infrastructure. Classrooms are well-furnished, library has more than 30,000 books and has all the books of all the subjects by the best authors. My college shows a great interest in the students who want to take part in the sports. My college offers one of the best sports teachers. The canteen is the best part of my college. It is the best place to stay during free classes. My college even offers a good hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: NIF Global, Lindsay Street, is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very beautiful and good. Classrooms are also good. Teachers are excellent. Every teacher is good in their subject. The college environment is very good for study, and many events happen in the college, like fashion shows and exhibitions.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good with the fashion designing course .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty small if you ask me, the campus is in a building with 4 floors in the middle Esplanade market. It does have a Library with all kinds of journals for the students. The whole building is air conditioning. There are multiple stitching labs with many classrooms with smart boards. There is also a computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: Our college will give you plenty of opportunity.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is so well build that it accomodates enormous occupance of students. Every department has its separate room like we have Theory room, practical room, AutoCad room, A/V room, we do have a lovely collection of Interior and Fashion related books for in the library .

reviews.review_heading: Review of INIFD - Inter National Institute of Fashion Designing, Lindsay Street.
reviews.review_text: In our time it was lockdown so I did not get hostel facility. The hostel is now reopened and it is good. They do not provide food, but they provide a kitchen. They also provide a UG certificate from Annamalai University.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely the best institute for fashion and interior designing.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very attractive and creative. There were stitching labs, computer labs, textile labs, designing room, pattern cutting lab, activity room, common place to sit, cafeteria, and every class has different rooms. Hostel provides facilities like 24 hours electricity, water supply, sharing rooms, and single rooms with bed, cupboard, table, and attached washroom. Wi-Fi, air-conditioned rooms, TV, fridge, separate kitchen, hygienic hand made food, cleaner, and dining area are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Kolkata's best designing college.
reviews.review_text: My college has a very good infrastructure. Classrooms are big, with many CAD labs, pattern labs, and lots of sewing machines. We can practice any day at any time. We have also a hostel facility, also have a library and almost 30000 books are there, fully AC campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for designing course in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college has a library, pattern making lab, CAD lab, Wi-Fi facility, GC lab, lots of sewing machines and a huge hall room. There are good common rooms for us. The entire campus is air-conditioned and is under CCTV surveillance. There is also a hostel and security guard, and we are very much satisfied with our campus.

highlights.summary: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Goa admission 2025 is open. Interested candidates can apply on the official website of the institute.

college_info.intro: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Goa offers different programmes at multiple levels. The institute has been offering these programmes to the students and helping them to attain skills, qualifications, and knowledge to start a career in the field of their choice. The institute is popularly known for its diploma programmes, which are offered at multiple levels and streams. The programme's duration ranges from days to months to years. In addition to the academic curriculum, students are also exposed to industrial trends during the industrial visit which provides them an insight into the trends, and challenges of the industry.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Goa offers programmes at different levels in the stream of design, fashion, and management. Students can choose among these programmes and get skilled to start a career in the same. There are two bachelor's degree programmes, six master’s and 14 Diplomas, Advanced Diplomas, and PG Diplomas. These programmes are in the range of 40 days to three years in duration.

highlights.summary:
The NID DAT 2026 (Prelims) exam result for Sasi Creative Colleges admission to the BDes course will be announced on Apr 7, 2026. Additionally, the MDes DAT Mains exam 2026 has been concluded, and the results will be announced soon.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - Sasi Creative College of Design (CCD) - Sasi Creative School of Architecture (CSA)

college_info.intro:
Sasi Creative Colleges popular programmes are BSc and BDes. For BSc, BDes, and other course students, there is a fully-equipped library with the latest infrastructure. The library has over 4,000 books. Out of these, 1,000 are international books and journals. There are regular workshops and conferences held for students at international and national levels. For offering courses and advanced training, the college has collaborated with various companies and organisations.
Sasi Creative Colleges recruits experienced faculty members. The faculty are trained to teach students with advanced knowledge and skills. Sasi Creative Colleges is one of the best colleges offering Design and Architecture courses to students. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Sasi Creative Colleges in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Sasi Creative Colleges placement 2024 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. The highest package recorded by the College was of INR 20 LPA for its 2024 graduates. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by a dedicated placement team. The college attempts to maintain partnerships and collaborations with industry figures to provide internship opportunities and a industry-academia interface for its students signing MoUs with firms in Coimbatore and Chennai such as Triple O Studio (Design Firm).

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth joining Sasi Creative Colleges?
overview_faqs.answer: Sasi Creative Colleges placement report is yet to be released for the batch passing out in 2022. However, Sasi Creative School of Architecture has released the NIRF report 2022 on its official website. According to the NIRF report 2022, 39 BArch students were placed during Sasi Creative School of Architecture placements 2021. Further, the median package offered to BArch students during the 2021 placements was INR 2.4 LPA. The top recruiters of Sasi Creative School of Architecture in recent years included Khatib & Alami, FHD Group, AECOM, Studio Decode, etc. Stduents can check detailed SCC placement stats here.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing BDes at Sasi Creative Colleges?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing BDes at Sasi Creative Colleges as it recognised by the UGC and offers some courses in affiliation with Anna University, Chennai, and Alagappa University. Sasi Creative Colleges courses are offered to students at the UG level in full-time mode. The college is known for its BDes programme offered to students for a duration of 4 years, across several specialisations such as Fashion Design, Interior Design, Communication Design, etc. Apart from this, Sasi Creative Colleges offers hostel facilities to students and has collaborated with various companies and organisations.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sasi Creative Colleges approved?
overview_faqs.answer: Sasi Creative Colleges offers some UG courses in affiliation with Anna University, Chennai, and Alagappa University and some of the courses are recognised by UGC. The B.Arch course provided by this college is approved by COA, New Delhi.

faqs.answer: Students can check the points mentioned below:Stage 1 – Written Test where we test Analytical, Logical, Quantitative, General Knowledge, Creativity, and Conceptual Abilities Stage 2 – Design Portfolio Review & Personal Interview with our panel of educationists, design practitioners, counsellors and other senior faculty membersNote: The Stage 1 Written Test and Stage 2 Portfolio Review + Personal Interview of the Creative Institute of Design will be conducted on the same day in the forenoon and afternoon sessions respectively.
faqs.question: What is the pattern for various Design course entrance exam at Sasi Creative Colleges?

faqs.answer: The selection critera is mentioned in the two steps. The detailed steps are mentioned in the points below:Stage 1- SCIDT (Sasi Creative Institute of Design Test)Stage 2 – Design Portfolio Review + Personal Interview Note : The Stage 1 Written Test and Stage 2 Portfolio Review + Personal Interview of the SCIDT will be conducted on the same day in the forenoon and afternoon sessions respectively. ( For Exam Dates please refer SCID Application Form)
faqs.question: What is the BSc selection criteria at Sasi Creative Colleges?

paragraphs: Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. Aspirants need to appear for an entrance exam conducted by the college for admission. Check below the steps to get a seat in Sasi Creative Colleges:
STEP 1: Sasi Creative Colleges Application Process 2026

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://sasicreativecolleges.com/scc-admission/ for admission to the various programme. The fee for the SCID course application is INR 1,250. The application fee can be paid in Cash/DD/NEFT.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The institute selects candidates based on SCID Online Entrance Exam followed by Personal Interview for BDes, MDes and BSc courses. Similarly, for the BArch course, candidates are selected based on NATA + PI. For the final selection, it also considers the candidates' academic performance.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seat in the college. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification. Candidates also need to pay theSasi Creative Colleges feesto confirm their seats in the institute.

courses_data.name: Sasi Creative Colleges BDes Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: Sasi Creative Colleges offers four-year BDes courses at the UG level in Industrial Design,Fashion Design, Interior Design andCommunication Design. Candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent can apply for the BDes programme. Admission to this course is based on entrance exam conducted by the college followed by a personal interview round.

faqs.question: Are admissions to BDes at Sasi Creative Colleges entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BDes course at Sasi Creative Colleges is based on the SCID Online Entrance Exam and Personal Interview. The SCID exam comprises a General Proficiency Test (GPT), which evaluates English Comprehension, Grammar, Basic Mathematics, and Logical Reasoning, as well as a Design Aptitude Test (DAT), which contains situation-based questions requiring drawing and writing a synopsis about them, followed by a Personal Interview.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to BDes at Sasi Creative Colleges?
faqs.answer: To get into Sasi Creative Colleges for a BDes course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Sasi Creative Colleges offers full-time BDes courses of five years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid SCID Online Entrance Exam + PI. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

courses_data.name: Sasi Creative Colleges MDes Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: Sasi Creative Colleges offer MDes for two-years at the PG level. The programme is divided into four semesters. The college offers MDes in Industrial Design and Communication Design. Admission to MDes programme is based on entrance exam scores of the candidates followed by a PI round. Aspirants must pass a bachelor's degree to apply for the MDes programme.

faqs.question: How much percentage is required for admission to MDes at Sasi Creative Colleges?
faqs.answer: To get into Sasi Creative Colleges for a MDes course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Students must pass graduation. Sasi Creative Colleges offers full-time MDes courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid SCID Online Entrance Exam + Personal Interview.

faqs.question: Who can apply for MDes at Sasi Creative Colleges?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete graduation from a recognised institute or university to apply for MDes programme at Sasi Creative Colleges. Aspirants must have documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Admission to MDes programme is entrance-based.

faqs.question: Is Class 12 score enough for admission to Sasi Creative Colleges?
faqs.answer: Yes, Class 12 marks are sufficient for those seeking admission to undergraduate courses at Sasi Creative Colleges The institute offers BSc, BDes and MDes course. Students can refer to the table presented below to understand the eligibility criteria for each courses:CoursesEligibilityBArchClass 12 with 50% aggregateBDesClass 12 or equivalentMDesBachelor's degreeBScClass 12 or equivalent

faqs.question: What is the application selection procedure for quota based students at Sasi Creative Colleges?
faqs.answer: The details application selection procedure for quota based students at Sasi Creative Colleges is mentioned below:Submit completed Application Form along with all marksheets and NATA application form or NATA Score Card along with details of DD if application fee is paid by DDSubmit Receipt of Application Fee via NEFT / CashShortlisting of Candidates based on their Class 12 and NATA Scores.Intimation to chosen Merit List Candidates for attending Entrance Exam and Personal Interview in person.Release of the Final List of Admitted Students for the respective Batch of B.Arch Students at Creative School of Architecture, Coimbatore.Acceptance of Admission with payment of fees.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BDes course at Sasi Creative Colleges?
faqs.answer: Sasi Creative Colleges admissions are mainly based on merit, entrance exam scores, GPT, DAT,  and Personal Interview rounds. The mode of the Sasi Creative Colleges admissions is online. The college offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level such as BSc,  BArch, and BDes. It is mainly concerned with Design and Architecture streams and offers courses in full-time mode. Further, candidates seeking admission to the BDes programme must be Class 12 passed or equivalent.

Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication & Media, Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Science, Business & Management Studies, Hospitality & Travel, IT & Software, Teaching & Education. review_summary.college_name: IISU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MCA in Data Science - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: IISU Jaipur College Review.

content.Placements: When students can start applying for campus jobs is different for every department. For my course, we can start applying in our third semester. Seventeen companies visited my department for placements, including American Express, Josh, and Mediatek. The highest package offered was 17 LPA by Mediatek! About 63% of the students from the previous batch got placed. I'm hoping to get a good job after I graduate, too.
content.Infrastructure: The department provides Wi-Fi, and the labs are well-maintained. The classrooms are spacious, and the library has a great collection of books. The hostels are usually good and kept clean, but the food in the mess and the food street is only average. They have basic medical facilities and lots of options for sports and fun, so you won't be bored. To be bored.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: IISU Jaipur College Review.

content.Placements: Big companies came to hire us, even the "Big Four" like E&Y, Deloitte, Accenture, and Tata Consultancy. The highest salary someone got was around LPA, and the lowest was about 2 LPA. Overall, 60 percent of students in our course got placed. So overall, a good experience.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has excellent facilities. There’s Wi-Fi, the lab gear is in top condition, and the classrooms are clean, large, and have projectors. The library is huge, with more than 200,000 books. The medical and sports facilities are fantastic. The hostels might be a bit old and maybe not the best for second-year students, but they are okay for everyone else. The one negative thing is the food in the mess, which I would only give a 2 out of 5 rating.

individual_reviews.title: IISU Jaipur College Review.

content.Placements: The highest salary offered was about 5 LPA, but the average salary was around LPA. For final jobs, about 50% of us got placed. For internships, 40% of students got them. We usually had companies like pharmaceutical companies, diagnostic labs, food industries, and research places visiting.
content.Infrastructure: A really good thing about the university is its modern facilities and extra features. The library is full of books and academic magazines. The canteen is big and has many kinds of food. Students are happy with the well-managed hostel, where the food is basic but meets good standards.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Marketing Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIS (Deemed to be University).

content.Placements: About 60-80 percent of students get placed. Some companies that visit the college are Cognizant, Goibibo, Accenture, Publicis Sapient, KPMG, Burger King, etc. The highest salary package offered is really good, and it is 19 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The overall college setup is only average. The campus has Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, cozy classrooms, and a huge library. Since the library has so many books, students don't have to buy a lot of study materials from outside. It also has bus services and housing on campus. The dining hall is kept clean. individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIS (Deemed to be University).

content.Placements: Our college is one of the best for placements in Jaipur. Every year, about 90 percent of students from every batch get placed. Big companies like Wipro and TCS visit every year to hire students. But, on the flip side, there aren't many chances for us to get internships here.
content.Infrastructure: The campus buildings and grounds cover all the main needs. It has clean water, big science labs, an auditorium for events, a field for sports, and a library with lots of books. Classrooms are neat. The college provides bus service and places to live on campus for those who need them. The mess hall is clean, and the food is okay, though having a few more meal options would be better.

Download IISU Jaipur Prospectus
lists: Apply online or offline at the university official website or campus.

Those who clear these rounds, must appear for document verification.
After getting admission offer from the university, pay the course fee to secure the allotted seat.

reviews.review_heading: IISU Jaipur College Review.
reviews.review_text: The department provides Wi-Fi, and the labs are well-maintained. The classrooms are spacious, and the library has a great collection of books. The hostels are usually good and kept clean, but the food in the mess and the food street is only average. They have basic medical facilities and lots of options for sports and fun, so you won't be bored. To be bored.

reviews.review_heading: IISU Jaipur College Review.
reviews.review_text: Our department has excellent facilities. There’s Wi-Fi, the lab gear is in top condition, and the classrooms are clean, large, and have projectors. The library is huge, with more than 200,000 books. The medical and sports facilities are fantastic. The hostels might be a bit old and maybe not the best for second-year students, but they are okay for everyone else. The one negative thing is the food in the mess, which I would only give a 2 out of 5 rating.

reviews.review_heading: IISU Jaipur College Review.
reviews.review_text: A really good thing about the university is its modern facilities and extra features. The library is full of books and academic magazines. The canteen is big and has many kinds of food. Students are happy with the well-managed hostel, where the food is basic but meets good standards.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIS (Deemed to be University).
reviews.review_text: The overall college setup is only average. The campus has Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, cozy classrooms, and a huge library. Since the library has so many books, students don't have to buy a lot of study materials from outside. It also has bus services and housing on campus. The dining hall is kept clean. The food served is decent, but it needs a few more popular dishes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIS (Deemed to be University).
reviews.review_text: The campus buildings and grounds cover all the main needs. It has clean water, big science labs, an auditorium for events, a field for sports, and a library with lots of books. Classrooms are neat. The college provides bus service and places to live on campus for those who need them. The mess hall is clean, and the food is okay, though having a few more meal options would be better.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIS (Deemed to be University).
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are fully digital now. There are all kinds of labs we can imagine, from mechanical stuff to computer software. Every classroom has Wi-Fi. The main library has everything a student could ever need. The hostel rooms are decent with facilities like a bed, a table, and a chair. The quality of the food in the mess is good. It also has a small health clinic where we can get medical treatment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIS (Deemed to be University).
reviews.review_text: The hostel building is good. It offers a ton of features, like a gym, a study room, a canteen that's open day and night, a bookstore, a badminton court, and other sports facilities. However, I find the mess food pretty disappointing. The whole campus has Wi-Fi and CCTV cameras for safety. There are a lot of coffee shops, restaurants, and even malls right on campus. There are many fields for different sports. Classrooms are big and have new digital equipment. The library is good and is open 24x7.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIS (Deemed to be University.
reviews.review_text: My department has really great facilities. The college buildings and grounds are just okay, but every student could use the classrooms and the library. There is no Wi-Fi. The food and service at my hostel canteen are absolutely fantastic. Sports and games are also good. The college has all facilities we need, from the basics to the more important stuff.

reviews.review_heading: IISU Jaipur College Review.
reviews.review_text: The campus has all the important academic buildings, a central library, well-equipped labs, and Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. Students can use residential facilities and dining halls. The hostel accommodation is considered satisfactory. The food in the mess is average, and there is health centre with medical staff available for students.

reviews.review_heading: IIS Jaipur College Review.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite impressive. The library is peaceful and has a good variety of books. The canteen serves nutritious meals. The hostel could be better, but it is comfortable enough. The mess maintains hygiene, and the water supply is reliable.

reviews.review_heading: I love faculty, but was unsure about the campus.
reviews.review_text: The college had ample facilities in the psychology department, with fully equipped labs, proper infrastructure, and commendable faculty. The canteen had a variety of options at relatively affordable prices. Other than that, there was also an Amul parlor, which offered milk and milk products at good pricing.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, excellent faculty, and promising placements.
reviews.review_text: The university offers smart classrooms and well-equipped computer labs with all essential software. The library has a varied and good collection of books and also gives access to E-library. Basic medical care is available on campus. The campus also provides various sports options and has a gym too. Hostel rooms are clean and decent. The food is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of this university.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility of the university is good. All the rooms have ducting facility, separate living baths, RO water facility, and water theater facility. There are mainly breakfast, lunch, tea, and dinner. The quality of food is very good compared to others.

reviews.review_heading: Education and placements both are decent.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were good, with clean rooms and basic amenities. The mess food was decent and hygienic. Medical facilities were available on campus. Wi-Fi connectivity was present, and the classrooms were also big. There was a central library, and it had a good collection of Physics journals.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and all other amenities are of decent quality.
reviews.review_text: The department was good, and they tried to provide a good learning atmosphere with maintained labs. There was a well-stocked library. There were spacious and lighted classrooms. The rooms in the hostel were quite comfortable. There were also common rooms that acted as a recreational place.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Aided Design Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's a waste of time and money.

content.Placements: There are 70 students in my class, but by the 6th semester, only 26 remained. After the 6th semester, only 10 students passed on their first attempt, while the others failed. A few companies visit our college for placements, but the offers are below average and not enough to sustain a living. Most students do not accept placements through the college. Many students also had to repeat their first year.
content.Infrastructure: College classrooms have the worst infrastructure ever seen, with them being dirty and having leakage of water everywhere in the rainy season. There's a little canteen which just offers samosas only, and most of the time it remains close. There is no Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Production Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and placement record.

content.Placements: Last year there was a record of 100% placement rate from production engineering. The highest package was 4 LPA, the lowest was 1.4 LPA, and the average package was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Wipro, Hero, and TATA Motors. All the students from the production branch got internships in the final year. The top role offered in the production branch is supervisor.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Government Polytechnic Ghaziabad College is not that good. This needs to be renovated. Labs are good; all the labs and library are working. There are 4 workshops in our college: welding, plumbing, carpentry and sheet metal. The hostel of the college is very good; rooms have enough space but the food in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and placement record.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Government Polytechnic Ghaziabad College is not that good. This needs to be renovated. Labs are good; all the labs and library are working. There are 4 workshops in our college: welding, plumbing, carpentry and sheet metal. The hostel of the college is very good; rooms have enough space but the food in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are too good  in this college .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available throughout the whole campus of the college. Labs are separately available for all branch students. Their mess quality is better in comparison to other colleges . Medical facilities are available all the time, 24x7 . A huge library is on the college campus. College infrastructure is good .

reviews.review_heading: My review for finding a good college.
reviews.review_text: College's building condition is good. A new branch add in my college from previous year. Classrooms are good with all facilities like lighting, fans, smart boards, etc. Computer labs with 75 computers are in college. Big campus is available in college. The hostel facility is good and mess is too good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in IT branch at GPC ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connectivity and hot water amenities are absent in our hostel. Nonetheless, a well-equipped playground is feature. Located at the city's core, our college guarantee crucial facilities, inclusive of a library. Furthermore, active NCC and NSS clubs are operation on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for production engineering in Ghaziabad but teachers are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Classrooms are well-maintained. Laboratory is very good. Canteen facilities are great. There is a decent library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Top college for production engineering .
reviews.review_text: Government. Polytechnic gaziabad had many cultural events and sports events. We have freshers' parties for new incoming students and also have farewells for the outgoing students. It has a very good alumni network where different people who are experts in their respective fields come and gives pep talks. We also have social service events where Teamshambhava a Ngo comes to college and educates students about service. Tata Motors scholarships, AICTE scholarships etc. Are provided for the students...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Mechanical laboratories are not well-maintained. Wi-Fi is accessible in both hostel and library. Medical facilities are available. Hostel rooms are average. Wardens are very good. The food served in the mess is not good. Canteen is average. Various sports facilities are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best government college in Ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus. We have a canteen and a mess. The hostel facilities are very good. The hostel has comfortable rooms. The mess and canteen provide very good food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There is a central library in this college. Canteen is also available. We have a sports room on campus. Playground is huge. Laboratories are well-equipped. Hostels are great. The food served in the mess is decent. Sports are conducted in this college. There is a stationery shop on campus. A fast food outlet is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is situated in a good area.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are very good. The infrastructure is decent in our department. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are very good. Classrooms are well-maintained. We also have access to online resources. There is a well-stocked library in this college. Mess is available on campus. The food served in the canteen is great. There is a medical center to ensure students' health. It also provides immediate medical assistance to students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for IT students.

There is a medical center in this college. Sports are conducted on campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides excellent infrastructure. It has separate sections and buildings for boys and girls. It has a library. The campus provides Wi-Fi. The staff maintains the hostel well. The hostel provides a pleasant and conducive environment for all residents.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The mechanical labs require significant improvement as they are not well-maintained. The lab teachers don't have adequate skills and knowledge. Wi-Fi is accessible in the hostel and library. Medical facilities include a basic medical room and a restroom. The hostel facilities are average. The warden should be good. The food served in the mess is unsatisfactory during summer but acceptable in winter. The food served in the canteen is good. They provide s...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: All amenities are good. Laboratories are well-equipped. Classrooms are spacious. The medical services are good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The connectivity is average. reviews_list.review_title: Dissatified with my college.

review_content.Placements: The college course is not very useful for getting jobs these days and our college is known for it's careless nature towards students future. Nobody cares about the attendance or marks. They placed way too many students for one specific course and it became very distracting for us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is built like a hotel and they charge way too much for canteen food. Wifi was available but the connection was poor so rarely any student uses it. We had a small ground which was most of the time crowded by seniors when we were juniors.

review_content.Infrastructure: There were labs that had fabrics of all kinds for practical purpose and projects were very productive and helpful. The classrooms are air conditioned and properly maintained. The canteen is also fairly managed. It is like a luxury to be in this campus and studying this course.

Kalapurnam Institute provides a comprehensive range of courses in the certificate and diploma realms. Students can choose from courses to pursue from diverse domains like Multimedia, Design, Cinematic, and Marketing. The flagship programs at the institute include courses in Graphic Design, Animation, Fashion Design, Interior Design, among others. These and various other specializations are included in the large collection of Media and Design courses at Kalapurnam Institute.
Find out more on Kalapurnam Institute popular programs below:

college_info.college_name: CT Institute of Higher Studies

highlights.summary:
Admissions 2023 are open to all the courses. Aspirants can apply by visiting the CTIHS official website (admission.ctgroup.in).

CT Institute of Higher Studies or CTIHS is a prominent part of the CT Group of Institutions. The institute is affiliated to Guru Nanak Dev University, Amritsar and it offers undergraduate programmes in various fields such as Commerce and Management, Humanities, Science, Journalism and Mass Communication, Interior Designing, IT, etc. The institute also provides curricular, co-curricular, and extra-curricular activities to its students.

The students get an advantage of top-class training and best placements through industrial inputs from a number of renowned corporate houses like Merck, L&T, TCS, L&T, ING, Renault Ranbaxy, Honda, etc. The institute has well-experienced faculty and well-equipped infrastructure.

The major highlights of the CT Institute of Higher Studies are as follows:

Candidates seeking admission to all undergraduate courses offered by the CT Institute of Higher Studies can apply online on the official website of the institute. They can fill the online application form and submit the same before the last date. Some quick facts related to CT Institute of Higher Studies admissions are mentioned below:

Read more: CT Institute of Higher Studies Admissions

CT Institute of Higher Studies offers eight undergraduate programmes in full-time mode. It offers BPT and BDesign programmes for a duration of four years each. The BSc programme is offered under four specialisations. All the programmes apart from BDesign and BPT are offered for the duration of three years.

The eligibility criteria along with the duration of CT Institute of Higher Studies courses are mentioned below:

Read more: CT Institute of Higher Studies Courses Courses

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty, placements and lack of opportunities in the college.

review_content.Placements: We do not get many placements; we search for our own for internships and jobs, and the companies they choose for placements are average. Only 20% of students got placed until the college started. Students have to suffer for the internships and jobs; there have been no placement events for our course in 3 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provide the facilities of a library and computer lab but the books are not relevant according to our course, and computers do not have appropriate software. The food is average, the canteens are not clean, in sports and games, our college is pretty good, and medical facilities are provided by the dispensary of the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Everything at our college has value for money. Its teachers, classrooms, and mess are good.

review_content.Placements: The quality of placements is good. CSE has the highest number of placements. Our college achieves more than 1700 placements. Students get salary packages ranging from 4 LPA to 17 LPA. Many reputed companies like Tata, TCS, and Reliance come to our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. They provide many facilities, like a gym, canteen, Wi-Fi, and a mess. Everything is good. Classrooms and labs are clean. Overall, the maintenance is good. The canteen is clean, and it provides hygienic food.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of a BSc IT graduate?
overview_faqs.answer: BSc IT graduates can get an initial annual salary package between INR 3 LPA to Rs 6 LPA. Candidates with and BSc IT degree can get profiles such as Programmer, System Engineer, Software Engineer, Network Administrator, Hardware Engineer, Tester, and System Analyst.However, the salary you get also depends on your skills and expertise in a particular area or the company or location you choose to work for.

review_summary.college_name: CT Institute of Higher Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is wonderful.

content.Placements: 90% of the students were placed in this course. The highest package was around 9 LPA, and the lowest one was about 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Tommy, Reliance, and Coca-Cola. About 95% of students get internships. The roles differ; some students were posted in administrative positions, while others were selected for management teams.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty cool and fine. Every campus has the facilities of Wi-Fi, and the speed of Wi-Fi is so fast and furious. To get the password of Wi-Fi, one has to register yourself with the department. Hostel facilities are fine, and all games are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a good experience.

content.Placements: Around 73 %out of 60 students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.6 LPA. It depends on companies whether they are top or not. The main recruiting team consists of our institution's group, the admin team, and additional members from the government and Naukri.com. In the 6th semester, it is mandatory to do internship programs. Around 80% of students got internships. The roles offered are technical recruiter, web developer, front-end developer, python developer, and data analyst.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty, placements and lack of opportunities in the college.

content.Placements: We do not get many placements; we search for our own for internships and jobs, and the companies they choose for placements are average. Only 20% of students got placed until the college started. Students have to suffer for the internships and jobs; there have been no placement events for our course in 3 years.
content.Infrastructure: They provide the facilities of a library and computer lab but the books are not relevant according to our course, and computers do not have appropriate software. The food is average, the canteens are not clean, in sports and games, our college is pretty good, and medical facilities are provided by the dispensary of the college.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Everything at our college has value for money. Its teachers, classrooms, and mess are good.

content.Placements: The quality of placements is good. CSE has the highest number of placements. Our college achieves more than 1700 placements. Students get salary packages ranging from 4 LPA to 17 LPA. Many reputed companies like Tata, TCS, and Reliance come to our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. They provide many facilities, like a gym, canteen, Wi-Fi, and a mess. Everything is good. Classrooms and labs are clean. Overall, the maintenance is good. The canteen is clean, and it provides hygienic food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best institute in Punjab.

content.Placements: I am in the BBA course. The highest salary package offered is 6.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like BYJU'S and Jaro Education visit our college to hire students from our course. Assistant manager and managerial jobs are offered in our course. I will complete my course in 2023. We will get a job in the 5th semester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi facility is available in hostels. Classrooms are good and huge here. Labs are also good, and the library is huge. Both non-vegetarian and vegetarian food is available in the canteen. The medical facility is also free of cost. The sports ground is also huge.

paragraphs: CT Institute of Higher Studies admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.CT Institute of Higher Studiesoffers courses at UG levels. Some of the courses include B.A. and UG Diploma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 62,565 - 2,50,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 18 months - 3 years.

Classrooms are clean and well-managed with proper desks and seating arrangements. The food quality in the hostel is average. It is nice but not of that level that we can give it 5 ...

Both non-vegetarian and vegetarian food is available in the canteen. The medical facility is also free of cost. The sports ground is also huge.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect institute for the students.
reviews.review_text: The library is very big. Campus infrastructure is excellent. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. The main emphasis is on sports. Mess and canteen are also very good. Classrooms are also having projector facilities. The classrooms are very big. Foreign Students also come to this institute.

reviews.review_heading: The college lacks behind in every prospect. However, a few staff members are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but not the best. Classrooms are not spacious, and in summers, students face much problem as there are only two fans in the classroom of more than 50 students with just a window and even there will be no windows in some classrooms. Overall, the building is good, but the college lacks behind in providing facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Proper discipline and good infrastructure with facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has each and every facility available the campus has its own fully operating wi - fi, there are proper labs for each department, proper workshop is available for the engineering departments. The doctor facility is also available from 9 A. M to 7 P. M. along with a nurse. Proper playgrounds and courts are available for various sports like cricket, volleyball, football, badminton, etc. The labs are in very good condition along with modern instruments and technology. The classrooms are ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and maintains good discipline.
reviews.review_text: Our college has almost every possible facility. The entire campus has its own Wi-Fi facility, and there are proper labs for every department, i.e., science department, information technology department, journalism department, etc. For the science department, there are a chemistry lab and a physics lab. The computer lab is available on every floor of our college. There is also a proper workshop for engineering departments. A doctor is available from 9 am to 7 pm, along with a nurse. There are var...

reviews.review_heading: Best educational institute.
reviews.review_text: Number one in infrastructure all over Punjab. Well equipped labs to give first hand information to students. Good hostel facilities for students with nutritional food services. Students are always under CCTV survillence whether in class or in labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college and worth the money spent.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure, with well-developed labs, proper internet facilities, projector-embedded classrooms, good medical facilities, many sports and very good exposure to both indoor and outdoor games. The quality of food available is good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Jalandhar, Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Our College building is very big. Here are two lifts, big green parks, and playgrounds, big Auditorium, a big separate hostel for boys and girls and also for international students. Big Cafeteria. There are much more central facilities like the best hostel with world-class infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is pretty much good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is pretty much good they provide Wi-Fi with a wide range to access the web for their studies which help them to get their job done easily world-class library provide best and to the point knowledge to the students, campus labs are installed with the latest technology. Sports rooms and playgrounds are also there for recreational activities.

reviews.review_heading: However, now I can see the improvements due to the arrival of our new principal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is actually good. All facilities like drinking water, electricity supply, comfortable benches, clean washrooms, and a good environment. Sports facilities are also available, and cleanliness is maintained across the whole campus at all times.

college_info.college_name: Bhagwan Mahavir University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Founded in 2019, Bhagwan Mahavir University is a private university. It is located in Surat, Gujarat. The institute is accredited with INC, AICTE and PCI. Bhagwan Mahavir University provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 184 courses across specialisations such as Data Science, Aeronautical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automation and Automobile Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Bhagwan Mahavir University fees ranges between INR 18,000 to 4,35,750. The student intake for these courses is 7142. Bhagwan Mahavir University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). Bhagwan Mahavir University offers all the campus facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bhagwan Mahavir University offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Bhagwan Mahavir University offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for Bhagwan Mahavir University courses range between INR 18,000 to 4,35,750.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college. It is the best place for your future.

review_content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary is 1 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. Around 80-90% of students got internships from my course in hospitals. The top role offered is a psychologist.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. The classrooms, library, labs, and halls are all perfect. The hostel facilities and food quality are also satisfactory. Meals are provided regularly and at an affordable price. Sports events and medical facilities are available, especially for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Thought of a student who studied in college.

review_content.Placements: In my college, approximately total of 5% to 10% of students are placed every year from this course. College doesn't provide any kind of internship students must find their internships. Only after securing an internship are they eligible to sit for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: They are least facilities provided by college to students. In college, there's a lift but it doesn't work for students. There is a very big problem with network in college after knowing that the college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities to students. For the use of library, we have to provide fees.

review_summary.college_name: Bhagwan Mahavir University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good university in Surat.

content.Placements: Placements are given but not more than 25000 rupees. Placements are given in big companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Tata Motors, and many other companies. All courses are available. Here computer students are more than other students so placements are good.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided here. Infrastructure is also very good. All departments are separate. There are many classes. Each class has 50 students. Canteen is very good and hygienic. All types of food are available here, and staffs are also good in nature, friendly, and cheaper than market.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not recommended for anyone. You should try some other colleges.

content.Placements: Not many students get placed from the college. The college claims 100% placement, but that is not true, so don't trust them. In Computer Science, placements are based on grades and marks, which often lead to cheap and unknown companies or services.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available here. The labs are good, but the Wi-Fi is poor and not accessible to students. The library is very small, with no comfortable seating. The computers in the labs are not well maintained and can go down at any time. There is no official canteen; there are some stalls, but they are not satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It is the best place for your future.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary is 1 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. Around 80-90% of students got internships from my course in hospitals. The top role offered is a psychologist.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. The classrooms, library, labs, and halls are all perfect. The hostel facilities and food quality are also satisfactory. Meals are provided regularly and at an affordable price. Sports events and medical facilities are available, especially for girls.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Thought of a student who studied in college.

content.Placements: In my college, approximately total of 5% to 10% of students are placed every year from this course. College doesn't provide any kind of internship students must find their internships. Only after securing an internship are they eligible to sit for placements.
content.Infrastructure: They are least facilities provided by college to students. In college, there's a lift but it doesn't work for students. There is a very big problem with network in college after knowing that the college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities to students. For the use of library, we have to provide fees.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of collage overall choice or not.

content.Placements: Students were placed on their skills, not based on this collage. College did not provide placements but could provide assistance placements. But we could not go for imaging and got jobs after course. Because this college did not provide proper placements.
content.Faculty: Teachers were great. They properly guide us for future planet and other our life success. They could help us friendly but some teachers were not friendly. They could attract good and communicate students to help the good students who were generous. College staff was also good. They could give important questions that come in exam so filler does not change in exam. Staff was also good and friendly. But other mentors were not good because they could also not provide proper student paths. Quality of education was not provided properly.

description: The Bhagwan Mahavir University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Bhagwan Mahavir University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 35824 and 50181 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering. The first round

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Environmental Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 35824 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Pharmaceutical Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and ,

Bhagwan Mahavir University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Bhagwan Mahavir University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

The Bhagwan Mahavir University GUJCET cutoff 2024 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to engineering and pharmacy courses at the UG level. The cutoff was released across categories in the AI and HS quotas. Considering the Bhagwan Mahavir University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the minimum closing ranks required among the general HS category students was 50052.

Bhagwan Mahavir University accepts the GUJCET entrance exam, followed by a counseling process for admission to its BE and BTech courses. In the table below, candidates can view the past three years' cutoff trends for different courses, specialisations, rounds, and categories.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Bhagwan Mahavir Polytechnic, Bhagwan Mahavir UniversityReviewed on 8 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Bhagwan Mahavir Polytechnic, Bhagwan Mahavir University review.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a very upscale area, and the infrastructure is great. The library and classrooms are top-notch, and every floor is kept clean and tidy. There are water stations on each floor, so students can refill their water bottles. The food in the canteen is good, and the college even has its own cricket ground, football ground, basketball court, and indoor game facilities.

reviews.review_heading: They are so poor in environment for your mental health .

The computers in the computer lab don't work; they don't even have Wi-Fi in college, and the desks used in the lab are very old. They don't provide any kind of specific chair in labs; you need to find tools in the whole college before you go to any laboratory.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for R.R. Group of Institutions admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the R.R. Group of Institutions:

college_info.intro:
R.R. Group of Institutions offers courses such as BTech and MBA as popular courses in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses for the duration varying from 2 years to 4 years on the basis of merit and valid entrance scores. Furthermore, R.R. Group of Institutions considers Class 12 qualification for UG level programmes with a minimum aggregate of 45%.
Whereas, for courses such as MBA, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. R.R. Group of Institutions offers these courses with a tuition fee ranging from INR 1.7 Lakh to INR 4 Lakh. For more details on R.R. Group of Institutions popular programmes, check out the table below:

placements.overview: R.R. Group of Institutions offers courses in UG, PG, UG Diploma and After 10 Diploma in full-time mode. Admission to these courses is offered on the basis of merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50% in Class 12 to secure admission in UG level programmes. Whereas, for PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. In addition to this, candidates must secure a valid entrance score in accepted entrance exams.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: R.R. Group of Institutions offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma and D.El.Ed. Whereas, at PG level, R.R. Group of Institutions offers course such as MBA/PGDM. R.R. Group of Institutions fee structure for all the courses is around INR 94,300 to 4,02,300.

faqs.answer: A:    R. Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have completed 3 years Diploma in Agriculture Engineering with at least 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ ST) are eligible.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th std. with above mentioned marks from any recognised Board.D.EdCandidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised board.B.ArchCandidate who have passed Diploma in Architecture (10+3) from recognised board/university are also eligible.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Graduation with mentioned marks from recognised university.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in R. Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    R.R. Group of Institutions MBA eligibility requires students to complete graduation from a recognised university. In addition to clearing the minimum educational qualification specified by the college, students must also provide entrance exam scores. Alternatively, candidates are also offered direct admission provided they satisfy the criteria set by the institute. Students can provide scores obtained in CUET PG/ RR Entrance test, or any other accepted exam.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at R.R. Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    R.R. Group of Institutions BTech eligibility requires candidates to complete Class 12 from a recognised board with relevant subjects. The selection criteria may vary slightly depending on several parameters. Students are selected based on either entrance scores or merit (as per the institute's guidelines). Students must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects in Class 12. The required subjects set also vary depending on the specialisations.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for R.R. Group of Institutions BTech?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you may get admission at R.R Group of Institutions with 85%ile in the qualifying exam. However, the institute considers several parameters while shortlisting the candidates. Hence, just securing 85 percentile in the qualifying exam may not guarantee you a seat at the institute. Students may have to either submit entrance exam scores or appear for the institute-level exam. For detailed eligibility criteria and admission chances, students can fill out the admission form available at the official website.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure

content.Placements: In our college, core branch students get more than 90% placement, while non-core branches achieve 80%+ placement. content.Infrastructure: In our college, the campus is fully Wi-Fi accessible. The labs, classrooms, and the college library all have full Wi-Fi access. In fact, our classrooms are generally cooled below 25 degrees Celsius. The condition of the hostel is also very good, and the food quality is good as well.

admission_overview.college_name: R.R. Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Fees, Application

admission_process.title: R.R. Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: R.R. Group of Institutions admission 2025is a blend of merit and entrance-based. Students seeking to join the institute need to meet the eligibility criteria of the desired course. The institute offers courses in several fields, such as Management, Technology, etc. Students can pursue a variety of courses, such as MBA, BTech, and more. Candidates are shortlisted either on the basis of a valid score obtained in national-level entrance tests or academic merit as per the criteria of the course. The BTech and MBA courses are affiliated withAKTU& approved by AICTE, whereas, Polytechnic courses are offered in affiliation to BTE. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process forR.R. Group of Institutions.

R.R. Group of Institutions' course admissionis made on the basis of preset admission criteria. Students seeking to join the UG courses need to pass Class 12 in a relevant stream, similarly, PG admissions require students must have completed graduation. In addition to clearing the eligibility, students must also complete the selection criteria. Interested students can check out the following table to learn about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of theR.R. Group of Institutions courses:

The admission procedure for R.R. Group of Institutions involves application, shortlisting, and admission confirmation. Those who are seeking to get into the institute need to ensure that they meet the admission criteria beforehand. Students need to complete the entire process to get into the institute. Find below the steps for theR.R. Group of Institutions admission process:
Step 1: Check the Eligibility

The first step in the procedure requires students to check the admission criteria of the desired programme. The table above mentions the eligibility for some of the top courses offered at the institute. Candidates may visit the website for more details.
Step 2: Application Process
Apply online at the official website of the institute and fill out the application form available by providing the required details.
Step 3: Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on several parameters. Students need to either provide valid entrance exam scores, such as JEE/ CUET, etc., or appear for the institute-level entrance test. Alternatively, students may get direct admission provided they satisfy the prerequisite.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay the admissionR.R. Group of Institutions feefor seat confirmation.
Download RRGI Brochure
