faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for MBA programme offered by RR Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: For pursuing an MBA at RR Group of Institutions, candidates must have passed graduation with a minimum of 50% marks from a recognised university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at R.R. Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: R.R. Group of Institutions MBA eligibilityrequires students to complete graduation from a recognised university. In addition to clearing the minimum educational qualification specified by the college, students must also provide entrance exam scores. Alternatively, candidates are also offered direct admission provided they satisfy the criteria set by the institute. Students can provide scores obtained in CUET PG/ RR Entrance test, or any other accepted exam.

faqs.question: What all MBA courses are offered at R.R. Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: R.R. Group of Institutions offers multiple MBA specialisations. The eligibility for all of them is same. The college offers the MBA courses in affiliation with AKTU. Students can check out the following list to know about some of the MBA programmes offered at the college:MarketingHuman Resource ManagementInformation TechnologyInternational BusinessesFinance

faqs.question: Can I get R.R Group of Institutions with 85 percentile?
faqs.answer: Yes, you may get admission at R.R Group of Institutions with 85%ile in the qualifying exam. However, the institute considers several parameters while shortlisting the candidates. Hence, just securing 85 percentile in the qualifying exam may not guarantee you a seat at the institute. Students may have to either submit entrance exam scores or appear for the institute-level exam. For detailed eligibility criteria and admission chances, students can fill out the admission form available at the official website.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat at R.R. Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Candidates willing to take admission in R.R. Group of Institutions must first ensure filling out the application form. However, they must also ensure fulfilling the eligibility criteria required for admission in their preferred course. They must appear for the entrance exams accepted by the institute and achieve a valid aggregate in the same.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at R.R. Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Yes,R.R. Group of Institutions admissionsare open. Students can visit the official website of the institute to kickstar the proces by applying online. The institute accepts candidates primarily based on entrance exams + counselling. However, merit-based admissions are also offered. Aspirants can check out the course-specific admission criteria at the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in R. Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer: R. Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have completed 3 years Diploma in Agriculture Engineering with at least 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ ST) are eligible.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th std. with above mentioned marks from any recognised Board.D.EdCandidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised board.B.ArchCandidate who have passed Diploma in Architecture (10+3) from recognised board/university are also eligible.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Graduation with mentioned marks from recognised university.

Leading recruiters such as TCS, TATA, Capgemini, Amazon and many more took part in placing the RR Group of Institutions graduating students in 2025.

hostel_campus.college_name: R.R. Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel is well equipped with a common hall with television, and indoor games such as table tennis, chess, Carrom Board etc, the rooms in the hostel are spacious well lit, and well ventilated a dining area with mess facilities for breakfast, lunch and dinner, pay phone facility, water cooler with RO system and water geyser, Internet, 24 hours power supply, water and security is on the priority and available in the hostel.

library.description: The library of RRIMT, Lucknow at present has total collection of around 36,822 books with approx. 5,740 numbers of titles. Apart from this, there is also a significant collection of 150 journals (national and international). More than 300 online journals are also available for students. Magazines and non-print materials include 300 CDs, etc. Books are basically organized by the Dewey Decimal Classification (DDC) scheme, and cataloguing is based on AACR II, We have also membership of DELNET which covers online libraries of the world more than 2100 libraries including 22 foreign libraries facilitating 24/7 online access.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Professional Communication Lab, Network Lab, EMI Lab, PCB Lab, Energy Conversion Lab, Data Structure Lab, Microprocessor Lab, Simulation Lab, Numerical Technique Lab, DAA Lab, Integrated Circuit Lab, CAD Lab, Control System Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Refrigeration and  Air Conditioning Lab, Heat and Mass Transfer Lab, Structural Analysis Lab, Geo-Informatics Lab, Transportation Lab, Immunology Lab, Microbiology Lab, Downstream Processing Lab, Farm Machinery Lab, Soil Mechanics Lab, Irrigation Engineering Lab, Survey Lab

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: In our college, the campus is fully Wi-Fi accessible. The labs, classrooms, and the college library all have full Wi-Fi access. In fact, our classrooms are generally cooled below 25 degrees Celsius. The condition of the hostel is also very good, and the food quality is good as well.

reviews.review_heading: College facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: In my college from mechanical, civil, and electrical branches, 100% students are placed in good companies. In CSE branch of core programming-based work, 80% students are placed. From the biotechnology branch, some students are placed in the medical line, and they are doing well in their jobs. My course mechanical branch is very good. In this branch, 100% placement is available in our college for GATE oriented purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in budget for better career options.
reviews.review_text: Now we will talk about infrastructure so basically, infrastructure is good we can say but there can be better options for improvement regarding infrastructure. About college hostel food quality is good. Rooms are also good and 2 students per room. Also, gym facility is available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Top class institute of Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure this college has. Here, I experienced a very good environment for students for residential and educational purposes. I have watched some other colleges but I selected this college due to the best infrastructure. College has library, workshop, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college experience.
reviews.review_text: In our course, great Wi-Fi, modern labs, good classrooms, and a full library are available. Excellent learning support. Hostel has comfy rooms, tasty food, medical help, fun sports, and a healthy student life.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers a world of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well and good. It has Wi-Fi-enabled labs, smart classrooms, and a library. Wi-Fi is available across the campus. The fee of the hostel is also less, around Rs. 60,000 per year. The quality of the food is good. Sports equipment is allotted by the college itself. There is a gym facility in the hostel with a minimum charge of Rs. 500 per month.

reviews.review_heading: It has placements, skilled teachers, an industry-relevant curriculum, and good internships.
reviews.review_text: The department offers high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a vast library. Hostels are clean with secure rooms. The mess provides hygienic and nutritious food. The canteen offers diverse options. Medical aid and sports facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is good as they are focused on studies and extracurriculars too.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is available. In elaborated form, I can say that all the books related to the courses and streams are available in the in-house library. A good hostel facility in which the students get a proper food as breakfast, lunch, bunch, tea at evening with some snacks and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, good placement in 2015 and better in 2024 in my college.
reviews.review_text: My college has very good facilities. For example, Wi-Fi works, and the labs are very good. The teachers in my college are very good. Classrooms are cleaned every day. The library is available in my college, along with other facilities. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good, and the food is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, industry-focused curriculum, supportive faculty, but needs more industry ties.
reviews.review_text: The department offers high speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms and vast library. Hostels are clean with secure rooms. The mess does not provide hygienic, nutritious food, and the canteen does not offer diverse options. Medical aid and sports facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of studies and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have air-conditioned classrooms. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The library, hostel, and the food quality of the hostel are good. Medical facilities are provided. The hostel has a neat environment for students. There is a gym and strong security evergreen environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with my college because of poor faculty and the system and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: There were labs that provide practical training about the course. There is a library with a huge collection of books. The food quality was good, with hygiene and cleanliness being maintained. Sports and games were average. There is proper guidance from the warden.

reviews.review_heading: It is rigorous and disciplined; if I have to say, it is too strict. I am slightly dissatisfied .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is fundamental; the labs are available for the students, but the library does not contain a wide variety of books for the courses. The quality of food in the hostel is garbage. There are a lot of students from the hostel who don't even want to eat college food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very strict, and it is more like school than college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working well. Our classrooms are average. The food quality is not good. The oil quality is not good. It causes the throat to soar. There is only a single event for sports. They only want students to study while there will be no possibility for growth of other things.

reviews.review_heading: Here is the detailed review of RR Institute of Modern Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities available for the betterment of students as well as to enhance the environment of learning on the campus. All the classes are air-conditioned. Every floor has separate water coolers and washrooms for boys and girls. There are 6 computer labs, with each lab containing 70 systems.

paragraphs: R.R Group of Institutions offers scholarships to students on the following basis:
i) Top 10 students will get a scholarships of 50% on total tuition fees.
ii) Next 30 students will get a scholarship of 30% on total tuition fees.
iii) Next 50 students will get a scholarship of 10% on total tuition fees.
No, R.R. group of institutions does not charge any application fee for B.Tech or any other course.

The annual fee for a two-year MBA at RR Group of Institutions is 89,700 INR for the first year and 84,200 INR for the second year. RR Group of Institutions offers various specializations in MBA eg: Finance, Information Technology, Marketing, etc. It can be a bit expensive for some students. highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding BBK DAV College for Women Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BBK DAV College for Women offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, BBK DAV College for Women offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.Des.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Above 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. Above 80% of students got internships. Top roles offered are manager, CEO, etc. Wipro is the top recruiting company.

review_summary.college_name: BBK DAV College for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A college for efficient studies.

content.Placements: Almost all the students get placements from the college. The highest package offered is 500,000 per annum, and the lowest is 200,000 per annum. Companies like Axis Bank, HDFC, and various other insurance companies come for recruitment. There are quite high management roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not really pleasing. When you look at the ambience and sanitation, you would not be satisfied enough with it. I personally feel when it comes to infrastructure, it is the poorest of all. The canteen area is also not really soothing, so it's not up to mark.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Entertainment Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: BBK DAV College for Girls, Amritsar.

content.Placements: There are nearly 40-50% of students placed by the college. It also depends on the number of students, and the difference also varies yearly. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, TCS, etc. A total of 5 students got internships in top companies in my class. Many companies offer various roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and buildings of BBK DAV College are very nice and well-maintained. The infrastructure is very beautiful, with gardens, parks, playgrounds, and many other clubs available. The facilities provided by the hostels are also first-class.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. Above 80% of students got internships. Top roles offered are manager, CEO, etc. Wipro is the top recruiting company.
content.Infrastructure: Our college does not provide good infrastructure and facilities. The library is not good. Classrooms are not good in condition. The hostel facility is below average. The food served in the hostel is not good. Games are good. There is no canteen in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placements, good infrastructure and good facilities .

content.Placements: 40%of students got placed in the course. The highest package offered is 1,50,000 and the lowest package is 90,000 and the average package is 1,00,000. Top recruiting companies are HDFC bank, etc. 70% students get internship from the course every year.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in the course /department is good in labs, classrooms, library. Wi-fi is available also. The quality of facilities in hostel is good also. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical, sports and games faculty members are too good also.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college for studies.

content.Placements: About 40% of students got placements at Wipro, Aazad, etc. Placements start in the third year, and teachers prepare us for interviews. We are provided with proper training on how to deal with the interviewers.
content.Infrastructure: There is greenary all around.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, well-qualified, knowledgeable, and well-trained. They guide students in every field. They make sure that all the concepts are clear to students. Teachers are very humble and polite. They treat all students equally.

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, BBK DAV College for Women outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook-ICARE ranking system. In the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, BBK DAV College for Women's rank is #81, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'BCA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, BBK DAV College for Women's rank is #53, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'Commerce' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, BBK DAV College for Women's rank is #72, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: A college for efficient studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not really pleasing. When you look at the ambience and sanitation, you would not be satisfied enough with it. I personally feel when it comes to infrastructure, it is the poorest of all. The canteen area is also not really soothing, so it's not up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: BBK DAV College for Girls, Amritsar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and buildings of BBK DAV College are very nice and well-maintained. The infrastructure is very beautiful, with gardens, parks, playgrounds, and many other clubs available. The facilities provided by the hostels are also first-class.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide good infrastructure and facilities. The library is not good. Classrooms are not good in condition. The hostel facility is below average. The food served in the hostel is not good. Games are good. There is no canteen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placements, good infrastructure and good facilities .
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the course /department is good in labs, classrooms, library. Wi-fi is available also. The quality of facilities in hostel is good also. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical, sports and games faculty members are too good also.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for studies.
reviews.review_text: There is greenary all around.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a separate block for the PG department. Discipline is maintained in classrooms and outside the classrooms. Our campus is very clean. Havan is also performed daily at 8:30 AM to aware the children of Vedic culture.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college in Amritsar with efficient faculty members. Placements are rated 10 out of 10.
reviews.review_text: Our college has fully air-conditioned labs, spacious classrooms and a sitting area. The infrastructure of the college is superb. It is the best college in Amritsar. Cafeteria, cleaning and drinking facilities are available here. The hostel provides hygienic food to students along with full security.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Amritsar to opt for computer studies.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped and maintained computer labs and libraries. You can take benefit of all the basic facilities like parking, canteens, book shop, gym and playground.

reviews.review_heading: I had the best college life.
reviews.review_text: The quality of infrastructure is well-maintained. Wi-Fi facility is available in all departments. There is open access to the library and computer labs. The hostel is quite well-maintained with good quality food. Open and free medical facilities are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the college. The teaching pedagogy is also very old fashioned.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good but the hostel is not at all good they even do not allow the students to go out even in the morning and mess food is also very bad. Although they have 3-4 canteens and food is good l. There is no Wi-Fi facility available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers were acquainted with practical knowledge of the subjects. Good and satisfactory college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college was really very nice. Classrooms were well designed and were fully ventilated. Each department was having their own labs. Library of the college was also very nice and was fully air conditioned. College was fully equipped with the advanced gadgets.

reviews.review_heading: Really good placement number. Infrastructure and facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of college is good. Classrooms library and labs are also well structured. The hostel facility provided by college is also satisfactory. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also good. A good platform for the sports students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, staff and very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good with very clean surroundings. Laboratories are very clean and big. The library is very good, and medical facilities are the best. Games are very entertaining, and I like our PT teacher. The canteen at our college is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no AC classrooms, wi-fi facility is not provided by the college and classrooms are spacious enough according to the strength of the class. Library is quite good it contains all the books related to the course. Hostel is good and the food provided in the mess is also good in quality. The medical room is there in the campus. Gym is there in the campus itself. Canteen 's food quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of very few faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the BBK DAV College for Women is good. However, the commerce department is not so good. Classrooms are small, and there is no proper ventilation. There are at least 50 students in each class. Only one washroom is available in the department. The library available is good.

review_summary.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.

content.Placements: Our college provides good opportunities for students. Average students get placed at this college. Students get opportunities in the research and development fields. The average package offered in the college ranges between 4-6 LPA. Students also get internships at the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and of good quality. Classrooms are big enough with proper seating. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for the students. Multiple sports facilities are given to the students. Hostel facility is also given to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is very awesome.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact percentage of students who are placed in a company but at least 150 students get placed under a company every year. The highest package that is offered in my course is around 22 LPA, and the average package is about 6-7 LPA. To be honest, I don't know the company's name, but they are kind of agrochemical companies and they generally belong to Haryana, Gujarat, Assam and Pune. In the government sector, generally people go for a forest officer and food inspector and in private, there are field administrative officers, and many posts are offered by the companies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (L.L.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.

content.Placements: In LL.B., there are no such placements. I can't say about the highest, lowest, or average placement as there is no placement. Students are recurated by local advocates. Every student has to do an internship, which they can get by their own contact; you have to visit the door.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college facilities are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is very poor, with only 30 percent of students placed in my course. The highest package is INR 3 lacs per year the lowest package is INR 1 lacs per year and the average package is INR 1.8 lacs per year offered in my course. A top recruiting company like SEED Technologies offered jobs.
content.Infrastructure: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college faculty members are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is good and 70 percent of students placed in my course. In my course, the highest package is INR 5 lacs per annum the lowest package is INR 2 lacs per annum and the average package is INR 3.8 lacs per annum. The top role in my course is in the agriculture department.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure available in my department are good, with good Wi-Fi speed, good labs and classrooms, good painting, and a library available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good and boys and girls have separate rooms, but the mess is the same.

paragraphs: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, and CUET-PG for admission to specific courses.Kamla Nehru Group of Institutionsoffers courses at the UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 42 months - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 1 year - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 19,000 - 3,50,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,53,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

cut_off.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025: Check UPTAC Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 563961 and 971998 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engin

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 563961 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 437609 in 2023 and 149705 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated an improving trend

Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.

As the Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with the closing ranks of 1938444, 2105947 and 2118257, respectively.

For admission to Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.

Students who want to know the UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for various rounds can refer to the table below. Candidates also have the option to view the cutoff data for the previous two years, i.e., 2024 and 2023. These cutoff lists can also be downloaded for later use.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and of good quality. Classrooms are big enough with proper seating. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for the students. Multiple sports facilities are given to the students. Hostel facility is also given to the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very awesome.
reviews.review_text: There are several kinds of facilities offered in my course & infrastructure, as the infrastructure is very good. Classes are taken over a smart board and the lab practicals are also done by the professor so that we can resolve our queries and perform well in exams. In my college, there are also Wi-Fi facilities is also offered and there is a huge library where a variety of books is offered to us, which saves our money as expensive books are offered to us without any cost, which saves our money.

reviews.review_heading: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

reviews.review_heading: My college facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure available in my department are good, with good Wi-Fi speed, good labs and classrooms, good painting, and a library available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good and boys and girls have separate rooms, but the mess is the same.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good placement and facility.
reviews.review_text: My college facility is very good, and the infrastructure available in my department is good. The Wi-Fi campus has good speed, laboratories are available, and libraries are available. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very good; all boys and girls rooms are separate.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and placements are available at my college.
reviews.review_text: My college facility is very good, and there is good infrastructure in my department of college. Wi-Fi is available, and good labs, good classrooms, and a good library are available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good, and good-quality food is available in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are available. Fans are available in all classrooms. The library is good. The hostel and canteen are excellent. The quality of food in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are neat and clean. Fans are available in all classrooms. A library is available. The quality of the food is excellent. The hostel facilities are good. A mess and canteen are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are good. Fans are available in all rooms. A library is available. The quality of the food is excellent. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for any course. Good teacher and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: My college's facilities are good. All facilities are available at my college: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. Fans are available in good-type classrooms. My hostel facilities are good, and my room has a fan and a water supply that are properly maintained. My hostel food is of good quality, and medical faculty are available in my college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are well-maintained.   Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. The hostel facility is available in our college. The food served in the hostel is average. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was not good. The buildings were old. Desks and benches also needed to be changed. The college was basically situated between jungles. You can find too much greenery and grass on the campus, not like in the stadiums, but like on barren land.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a good education for the courses.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Our class runs in first building of college, in which Wi-Fi speed is good and lab is for B.Pharma students only. Classroom was well maintained. Library was full of books in which you can easily get books without any charge, but after 15 days, late fees are charged. If hostel facilities did not provide food, you would have to self-cook your own food. Room is large enough for two students to live comfortably. Canteen was available and sports. College gave ma...

reviews.review_heading: This college provides great infrastructure, and atmosphere is also good.
reviews.review_text: This institute has a great atmosphere. Wi-Fi is enabled on campus, and it has a great network of roads. It also provides a huge playground for various outdoor sports. A cafeteria is also available for indoor sports. The classrooms are large and it is well-ventilated. The laboratories are also available. In the hostel, it provides a 24X7 electric supply. The food served in the mess is average.

review_content.Placements: I don't think any of the students in this course were placed through the college. They only approached internships and vacant placements and that's the way to get placements at this college that I know. The most offered roles were bankers and many IT professionals, etc.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. review_summary.college_name: Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: know about Sardar Patel College in Chandrapur.

content.Placements: In my course, most of the students want to pursue their Masters to become more knowledgeable and eligible for good jobs in biotechnology. The average and highest package for the course starts from around 3.5 LPA, and I am not fully aware of the top companies for recruitment. The roles offered to our course students include research and pharmacy in scientist positions, something like research on particular based on medicine, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The structure of the college is at a good level, and the canteen, labs, and libraries are well-facilitated. There are many kinds of books available for studying, and we also have a computer science library for practice. The labs are fully equipped, and Wi-Fi is available in both the labs and the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college story with my experience.

content.Placements: I am in my 1st year of BCA so I don't have that much knowledge about the highest and the lowest. I know 20% of students per year get placed in good companies. The average package is around 5-10 LPA. The college also provides internships for students to solve real-world problems.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is only for girls, not for boys so I can't explain. There should be a hostel for boys also. Our department was renovated last month. Now, it is very good for studying. The library is also big. There are two libraries. All books are very well-arranged and they are easy to find.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Know about my college and see what I've shared.

content.Placements: I don't think any of the students in this course were placed through the college. They only approached internships and vacant placements and that's the way to get placements at this college that I know. The most offered roles were bankers and many IT professionals, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good according to the fees. Wi-Fi is available in the labs, it is clean and computers are available. Classrooms are good for studying. There is a library which is full of books, both related to the course and outside of the course is also available. Students can sit and study in the library, there are no restrictions.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The only opportunity to get a relevant degree at hand.

content.Placements: Around 300 students join this college every year. It is the only college in the whole district which provides the BCA course at an affordable fee for middle-class students. Salary packages are also quite good. Here you will get the opportunity to work with Accenture, TCs, and many more IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. Our college conducts inter-college sports as well as intra-college sports every year, which allows students to show their extra-curricular activities, be a part of everything and show their excellence.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: No Placements and Average Teaching .

content.Placements: If I tell you honestly, in my 3 years of experience, there were no placements at the college. We always try to OFF CAMPUS PLACEMENTS. The college has the worst placements. I have done a B.Com. in computer application from here, and I'm telling you this college is the worst in placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department is quite good. Wi-Fi, AIR CONDITIONER, GOOD QUALITY PCs available in our labs. But in the case of classrooms, its quite disappointing because the classroom is always very dusty, and we have to clean it every day on our own. And the library of the college is quite good; you can take any book along with you; every book is available there.

outlook.description:
Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #89, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #57, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'BCA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #79, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'Commerce' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #113, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: know about Sardar Patel College in Chandrapur.
reviews.review_text: The structure of the college is at a good level, and the canteen, labs, and libraries are well-facilitated. There are many kinds of books available for studying, and we also have a computer science library for practice. The labs are fully equipped, and Wi-Fi is available in both the labs and the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: My college story with my experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is only for girls, not for boys so I can't explain. There should be a hostel for boys also. Our department was renovated last month. Now, it is very good for studying. The library is also big. There are two libraries. All books are very well-arranged and they are easy to find.

reviews.review_heading: Know about my college and see what I've shared.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good according to the fees. Wi-Fi is available in the labs, it is clean and computers are available. Classrooms are good for studying. There is a library which is full of books, both related to the course and outside of the course is also available. Students can sit and study in the library, there are no restrictions.

reviews.review_heading: The only opportunity to get a relevant degree at hand.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. Our college conducts inter-college sports as well as intra-college sports every year, which allows students to show their extra-curricular activities, be a part of everything and show their excellence.

reviews.review_heading: No Placements and Average Teaching .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good. Wi-Fi, AIR CONDITIONER, GOOD QUALITY PCs available in our labs. But in the case of classrooms, its quite disappointing because the classroom is always very dusty, and we have to clean it every day on our own. And the library of the college is quite good; you can take any book along with you; every book is available there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has impressive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There's Wi-Fi for the practicals in BCA. The college even has an e-library, so students can browse whatever they want on the web if they don't find suitable information in books. Labs have all the facilities to perform every practical class. Classrooms are good for the fees paid.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for sports and study and also the facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: There is e-library, Wi-Fi, digital classroom, projector screen classroom, well-equipped laboratory, big ground for sports, All sports playing in this college. This is very good for Sports person. Also gymnasium facility are available. Ans band Minton coach and also big Shantaram Potdukhe hall for freshers party, dance competition and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Recommended my friends to join this college for better education and experience.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure are of very good conditions and with updated gadgets. Various kinds of labs are also known like Physics Chemistry bio, computer etc. The library with reading room where you can read anytime in college hrs
Classrooms are also all of good conditions.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I like this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good. I have completed my 11th, 12th and graduation in this SP college, but I have never bored with this college because it is best for graduation. You will always get the opportunity to learn new things.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: All the best facilities are provided to students like a big library of study materials, mess facilities and separate girls and boys hostel facilities. Canteens food is very tasty, and sports are very good, and for all sportsmen, there are good facilities. There is a different parking spot for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is really good.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to facilitate the college has it all. From library to labs everything is well maintained. Hostels are clean and food provided is also above average. Thought canteen does not have a lot of food options but still it's good enough to grab a quick snacks. College also has many sports teams which actively participate in events.

reviews.review_heading: Every student get good placement and internship at well reputed companies,curriculum was excellent.
reviews.review_text: Sardar patel college is one of the best college in chandrapur district. It has upgraded it's classrooms to facilitate teaching through modern tools and techniques. The classrooms with Wi-Fi enabled and LCD projectors. The best quality of hostel, quality of food available in mess and canteen, best medical facilities, sports at national level, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for studying.
reviews.review_text: Libraries, study rooms, and classrooms were provided. Wi-Fi facilities were provided. Hygienic canteen facilities and food services were provided. The campus was kept clean and tidy. The temperature of students and faculty members was checked daily at the entrance to take precautions.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best and affordable college in Chandrapur.
reviews.review_text: The campus is so attractive in looks with greenery atmosphere, classroom, lab and library availability. Only girls hostel is provided, whereas boys have to stay outside the campus. Canteen and food facilities are available. The campus holds games and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching staff members are well knowledgeable here.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college. Wi-Fi facility is also available for extracurricular activities, and there are labs for practicals. The library is also well maintained, and the classrooms are also well maintained. Our college provides hostel only for girls, and a canteen is also available here.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Chikkanna Government Arts College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. College offers B.Sc., BCA and B.Com courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.Com. The Chikkanna Government Arts College course fee ranges between INR 1,380 to 2,350.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Campus life was so good with friends and others.

review_content.Placements: Big companies like Ernst & Young and Deloitte offer placement to students. Seminars are held by different institutions and companies as well. Good packages are offered to the students on an average of 3.5 LPA, which can be considered very well in a city like Tirupur.
review_content.Infrastructure: We are available in three government hostels under the control of the college: two boys hostels and one girl hostel. He provides a food facility and all other basic facilities for the hostel. To college, send a letter to the collector to alert rooms. External Expenses: Rs. 2000–Rs. 4000

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Chikkanna Government Arts College.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students were placed. In campus placements, students get 2 or 3 companies, and the average salary offered ranges from Rs 10,000 per month to Rs 15,000 per month. This college degree certificate was very useful.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, all laboratory equipment was provided, and the classroom was good. I would not recommend hostels, because hostel infrastructures and the environment was not good. There were a lot of politics for beginners, recommended to avoid hostels, and the food facility was also available.

content.Placements: They provide only less amount of campus. They arranged campus placement offers at the time of the final semester. The highest salary package offered during placements is 2.5 LPA. Around 50% of students get placed on placements. After getting the degree, students should visit many off-campus placements and apply for jobs online.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides NCC, NSS, YRC, ECO Club, and sports like hockey, cricket, football, boxing, kabaddi, volleyball, and other indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are well-trained and handle the students well.

content.Placements: Campus placements are organized by the college or university itself. Basically, you have to do some formalities like fill out the placement forms and other things, while some other colleges have made it compulsory to participate in these activities. After this, there are the following phases in most of the companies, which are described below: Written test, Essay writing (it does not count in your scores), Technical test or technical interview, Hr round, etc. In an interview, to be specific, I must tell you they try to check out your confidence and ability to deal with certain situations; they don't check your knowledge, as they already checked it in the previous round. Some colleges allow students to sit in more than one company, while others may not. It depends on the college. But you are allowed to sit with more than one company if the package difference is high.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Campus life was so good with friends and others.

content.Placements: Big companies like Ernst & Young and Deloitte offer placement to students. Seminars are held by different institutions and companies as well. Good packages are offered to the students on an average of 3.5 LPA, which can be considered very well in a city like Tirupur.
content.Infrastructure: We are available in three government hostels under the control of the college: two boys hostels and one girl hostel. He provides a food facility and all other basic facilities for the hostel. To college, send a letter to the collector to alert rooms. External Expenses: Rs. 2000–Rs. 4000

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Chikkanna Government Arts College.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students were placed. In campus placements, students get 2 or 3 companies, and the average salary offered ranges from Rs 10,000 per month to Rs 15,000 per month. This college degree certificate was very useful.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, all laboratory equipment was provided, and the classroom was good. I would not recommend hostels, because hostel infrastructures and the environment was not good. There were a lot of politics for beginners, recommended to avoid hostels, and the food facility was also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, but I am dissatisfied with the placements provided.

content.Placements: First preference is always given to women for placements. Almost 30% - 40% of students get placed from college. The salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month and the placement chance is very low because all the companies choose private colleges. Hence we can't even get a chance for the interview. All the placement companies are asking about the name and reputation of the college, and we are studying in the government college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi in the college is not up to the level, because it is the government college and students studying here are from the middle-class family. So their facilities are not up to the level. Labs, classroom and library, are good. The hostel is provided for free to students. Canteen on the campus is average. Even sports in college are average because there is no special event organised for it.

overview_faqs.question: Is Avinashilingam University, Coimbatore good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Avinashilingam University Coimbatore is good for MBA. MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Cognizant, BNY Mellon, TCS, and many others. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, and others. Students are taught through case studies, internships, panel discussions, hands-on sessions, and others.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Sc available in Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women offers BSc programme with various specilisations. The university offers four-year duration BSc courses. Candidates looking for admission to BSc are required to fill out the basic eligiblity criteria set by the college i.e pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Further, candidates are required to apply and appear for CUET UG to grab the seat.

overview_faqs.question: Is a degree from Avinashilingam University valid?
overview_faqs.answer: Avinashilingam University Coimbatore is accredited with A+ Grade by NAAC (National Assessment and Accreditation Council) and is approved by UGC (University Grants Commission). Avinashilingam University Coimbatore Tamil Nadu, through various schools of study, offers UG, PG, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Interior Design and Resource Management and various other streams. The degree offered by this university is valid everywhere in India.

review_summary.college_name: Avinashilingam University Coimbatore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Textile Dyeing and Printing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Actually not that much placements are given by our college.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed. The average salary was Rs 10,000 per month. Zimzon was the recruiting company. 5% of students got internships in printing. Actually, this is a great college to study for a small amount of money. Studying in this college is good with a small amount of money to invest in studies and no more coming for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Actually, it was a great infrastructure and also had great labs. It provided super food sometimes. There was great infrastructure. We had a great library. We study in the evening in library. There was a good auditorium. There was super food in the canteen. There were clean restrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Rural Development and Sociology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really Good infrastructure and facilities to learn.

content.Placements: This course provided opportunities for most of students to be placed in government organizations, NGOs, government departments, etc. It provided internship opportunities to gain field-level experience in district administration through the District Collectorate, rural administration through Panchayats, and social work through collaboration with various best-running NGOs.
content.Infrastructure: The campus was clean and eco-friendly, with adequate classrooms and labs. Department-specific resources like rural development models, maps, and survey tools were available. The library was well-stocked with rural studies, development theory, and sociological texts. The quality of food was somewhat good. A medical room and doctors were also available to treat any sick students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the institution.

content.Placements: Maximum from valuable departments get placed in estimated companies and get a reasonable salary. There are highest and also average packages offered in Zoology. It is advised to continue M.Sc. After some exams, you can become an officer. Internships are there for UG students which is very useful.
content.Infrastructure: Whichever course you opt for they have heights laboratories and infrastructure with all the facilities in all the course. Wi-Fi is available for research purposes and libraries have a wide range collection of books. It has a peaceful environment for studying.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our course is 60%. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 4.25. Top recruiting companies for our course are Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, etc. Totally 80% of students got internships in various startup companies, and students who got placed will get internships in their respective selected companies. Top roles offered are data analyst, software developer, and graduate trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available are good like Wi-Fi connectivity, classrooms, drinking water facilities, library, canteen, a vast volume of books, learning materials, etc. Food quality is good in the canteen and also in the mess of hostel. The medical room is available. There is also a sick room on campus for taking rest. Sports and games are well-supported and encouraged here.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The title of the review is Rabika.

content.Placements: A very high percentage of students enrolled in my course, with more than 90% of them participating. The highest salary packages offered for my course ranged from 12 LPA to 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in India hired students from my college. About 30% of students in this course secured internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in my college were excellent, including Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, all accessible to every student. The food quality in my college was superb and delicious. However, medical facilities were not available on campus. Sports and games facilities were provided.

admission_process.title: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission is open for all the courses. Admission to all the UG and PG courses is entrance-based. Applicants can apply for the course of their choice online on the university's official website.Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Womenoffers many courses under UG, PG, and doctoral levels under various streams, such as Arts, Science, and Humanities. All the information related to the Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission 2024 is available in the following segments:

Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission to all the courses is entrance-based. The college offers various UG, PG and PhD courses. Candidates seeking admission to any courses at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and appear for the selection process accepted by the college. The basic eligibility for UG is to passClass 10 and Class 12from a recognised board and pass UG and PG degrees for admission to PG and PhD courses, respectively. Check out the table below for Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women courses, along with their eligibility and selection:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Pass Class 12 from a recognised board
Pass graduation degree
Class 12 from a recognised board
Check here to know more aboutAvinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women courses

Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission process begins with filling out the registration form. Applicants seeking admission to any courses must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university. Want to know complete details about the Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission process 2025, go through the following section.
Step 1: Application Process

Applicants looking forward to admission to various programmes at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women must fill up the admission form online by visiting the official website of the college. Application forms cannot be submitted without uploading the required documents.
Step 2: Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the applicants must have passed Class 12 for admission to UG and a graduation degree for admission to PG. Additionally, for all the courses, applicants must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university and score well. The university releases the shortlisted candidates’ list for all the courses based on their scores in entrance exams.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women will release a merit list of the selected applicants for all courses for the final seat allotment.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
The selected applicants must make theAvinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women feepayment within the given deadline to secure their seats.

placement_data.title: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Over 102 companies visited the institute campus during the 2023 placements. The total count of offers made to the 2023 batch of BTech , MBA , MA , and other courses was 936 . The overall highest package offered during Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women placements 2023 was INR 9.50 LPA and the lowest package stood at INR 2.50 LPA .

The institute has a Career Guidance and Placement Cell that organises various training, placement and internship activities. The cell first understands the students' interest towards higher education, seeking jobs and interest towards competitive exams. Over 120 hours of exclusive competitive exam training is provided to 70 students, who have registered for SSC Exams.

nirf.description:
Avinashilingam has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Avinashilingam's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Avinashilingam fell 1 rank to #99 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Avinashilingam University Coimbatore Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Actually not that much placements are given by our college.
reviews.review_text: Actually, it was a great infrastructure and also had great labs. It provided super food sometimes. There was great infrastructure. We had a great library. We study in the evening in library. There was a good auditorium. There was super food in the canteen. There were clean restrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Really Good infrastructure and facilities to learn.
reviews.review_text: The campus was clean and eco-friendly, with adequate classrooms and labs. Department-specific resources like rural development models, maps, and survey tools were available. The library was well-stocked with rural studies, development theory, and sociological texts. The quality of food was somewhat good. A medical room and doctors were also available to treat any sick students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the institution.
reviews.review_text: Whichever course you opt for they have heights laboratories and infrastructure with all the facilities in all the course. Wi-Fi is available for research purposes and libraries have a wide range collection of books. It has a peaceful environment for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are good like Wi-Fi connectivity, classrooms, drinking water facilities, library, canteen, a vast volume of books, learning materials, etc. Food quality is good in the canteen and also in the mess of hostel. The medical room is available. There is also a sick room on campus for taking rest. Sports and games are well-supported and encouraged here.

reviews.review_heading: The title of the review is Rabika.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my college were excellent, including Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, all accessible to every student. The food quality in my college was superb and delicious. However, medical facilities were not available on campus. Sports and games facilities were provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college is strict in terms of dress code, the faculty is okay, but the placements are average.
reviews.review_text: There are psychology labs for doing practicals. Classrooms are spacious, and the library is okay. In terms of the quality of food, in the mess it was not good, but the quality of food in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are there, like one doctor who comes in the evening. There are no proper sports facilities given to students who are not players.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my classroom and library were very good; everything is available in my college. The quality of food made in my canteen was so good. Medical and games as well as sports facilities are available for the students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women in M.Sc. Botany in 2025.
reviews.review_text: In this college, many facilities are provided like Fast Wi-Fi Connection, Clean Bathroom, Available Multiple Branches in Classroom, every student has a computer in Labs, Library, etc. Facilities are provided by the college. This college has a sports committee and gym khana committee that organises every year games and sports tournaments for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and environment is very well.
reviews.review_text: The environment of the college is very beautiful, well decorated, and pleasant. There are well-equipped classrooms, a large library, and some auditorium rooms. Apart from this, students have separate classrooms for teaching practice. There is no hostel facility here, but rooms are available nearby at very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Really good teachers, placements and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is available, as is the biggest library, comfortable lab facilities, and high-tech classrooms. We have clinic our college campus. The NCC candidates put the independence day parade in New Delhi. Football, volleyball, etc. are played here. The infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect college for women with great infrastructure and faculty members in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were really in good condition. We had lights and fans in all the classrooms. The benches were well-furnished too. We have a smart board for PPT presentations. We have a department library for our course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Very poor hostel and some good infrastructure. The hostel is very strict and students are not allowed to do anything without the consent of their parents. Outside foods are strictly not allowed in our college hostel. A vegetarian meal is provided for hostellers and they conduct prayer every morning .

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and highly knowledgeable teachers.
reviews.review_text: We have labs for all subjects, each highly equipped with new instruments. Our classrooms can accommodate up to 50 students and feature digital boards that facilitate understanding through visual examples.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for girls to equip themselves with excellent skills and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities and a learning environment are worth the effort. Hostel food was okay (only vegetarian meals). Laboratories and classrooms were well maintained and cleaned. Sports were given ample importance and the infrastructure was just awesome. In addition, the facility at NCC is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Computer labs are available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Smart boards and projectors are available in classrooms. The library is kept up-to-date. They provide newspapers daily. We need an ID card to scan the barcode to borrow a book from the library. Sports and games are considered the most important. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food in the hostel is good.

The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., UG Diploma and D.Pharma. At the After 10th level, the college offers courses such as After 10th Diploma. Meerabai Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Maharani Bagh Campus courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. individual_reviews.title: Meerabai Institute of Technology and Management life extremely happy to get in it my bestexperience.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students get placements from campus. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Sony India and Yokohama. Very good package even Yokohama takes students to Gujarat on their own basis.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college was so good. Classrooms were very big, neat, and clean always. Hostel was also very good with perfect security. Canteen was also very good and big with good food and perfect taste. Medical facilities were also provided on campus and hostel.

content.Placements: Meera Bai ensures 60% placement of students. College also ensures that students are well-prepared for interviews. They provide extra classes to improve body language, speaking skills, confidence, and more. Companies that visit Meera Bai for placements include Sony, Samsung, Vodafone, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of institute have a great library, good teachers, and well-built infrastructure. Accessibility of institute has a wheelchair-accessible entrance and parking lot. Location of college is well-located, with shops nearby. Admission procedure is unclear.
